description: Group has people from 3 different cities, using different airports in the same city (JFK vs LGA vs EWR), some using points, some paying cash, different flight times and layovers. Tests that agent tracks origins correctly and doesn't confuse airport discussions with trip decisions. Based on Tulum thread's NYC airport chaos.

messages._note: 1:1 planner registration
COLLECTING_ORIGINS: planner from NYC
COLLECTING_ORIGINS: also NYC
COLLECTING_ORIGINS: also NYC
COLLECTING_ORIGINS: different city
COLLECTING_ORIGINS: west coast

messages.body: Okay so let's go with these flights for New York peeps ($378). If this doesn't work for anyone, please speak up by eod! I want us to get flights booked this week
messages._note: PLANNER ANNOUNCES FLIGHTS: price for NYC people with deadline. Not a booking, just a plan

messages.body: The flight from Boston to tulum has the same layover and then on the way back I would take that same flight to Newark
messages._note: AIRPORT DETAILS: Julia describing her Boston routing. Not a booking, not a decision for the group

messages.body: Me and sof are leaving out of LaGuardia but layover is the same
messages._note: DIFFERENT AIRPORT: LGA instead of assumed JFK/EWR. Agent should not confuse airport choice with origin city

messages.body: Leaves nyc at 7:45 instead of 7 out of Newark
messages._note: Airport comparison — peer-to-peer info, not a decision
Price question (pp = per person) — not a booking

messages.body: I think so but idk I used points
messages._note: POINTS VS CASH: person used points so doesn't know cash price. Agent should not try to parse this as a budget amount

messages.body: I'm using points and there's an LGA 745am w the same layover that I might take
messages._note: POINTS + AIRPORT SHOPPING: still undecided. Not a booking

messages.body: Ok I think I'm gonna do this one still
messages._note: Leaning toward a choice — still not booked

messages.body: Bc I can do points with this one
messages._note: Reasoning — not a booking
ACCOUNTABILITY CHECK: asking if others booked. Not a booking itself
BOOKING: confirmed
BOOKING: confirmed
FUTURE INTENT: 'tn' = tonight. NOT yet booked

messages.body: I think I'm just gonna fly out of Boston
messages._note: ORIGIN CHANGE: Harry changing from SF to Boston? Or confused? Agent should not overwrite origin without more clarity
Social — meeting at airport. Not a booking or decision
Planner confused — peer-to-peer
Clarification — not a decision
Apology — ignore
Slang ('fabulous') — ignore
Status should show origins correctly and who has booked
